_comment: Manual wiring if NOT installing as a plugin. Merge into ~/.claude/settings.json (or .claude/settings.json in a project). Replace <PLUGIN_DIR> with the absolute path to loopx/claude_goal_mode. If your machine has `python` but not `python3`, replace `python3` below with `python` (or an absolute interpreter path). loopx drives Claude Code directly (no OS sandbox); the PreToolUse hook is the whole gate (should_run + Edit/Write write_scope + destructive-Bash denylist). For STRONG isolation, run Claude Code inside a dev container or VM.
